examples: Sciatica resolves on its own in three weeks in 75% of cases.
James Anderson, Richard Johnson, Andrew Flintoff and James Kirtley have all missed Tests with injuries and Andrew Caddick has been out since April with sciatica.
"I've got the hippie hippie ache" from Darren Spicer is a new entry, while Robbo The Doc storms into the top ten with "It could cause a cute sciatica".
